pending.subject: Causal ordering — Lamport clocks
pending.description: Add Lamport logical clock to each message for partial causal ordering across agents. Each agent increments its clock on send and updates on receive. Enable happens-before comparison between messages.

pending.subject: Bus snapshots — periodic full-state checkpoints
pending.description: Periodically write full bus state checkpoints for faster recovery and replay. Snapshot includes message count, timestamp range, and agent registry state. Add adhd_snapshot tool.

pending.subject: Agent verification — cryptographic identity
pending.description: Implement cryptographic agent identity beyond session ID. Each agent gets an Ed25519 keypair. Signin includes a signature proving key ownership. Prevents agent impersonation.

pending.subject: Capability tokens — signed authorization claims
pending.description: Issue signed capability tokens so agents can prove what they're authorized to do. Tokens include allowed tools, scopes, and expiry. Verified on each MCP tool invocation.

pending.subject: Bus access control — read-only vs read-write roles
pending.description: Enforce role-based access control at the bus level. Read-only agents can only call read/poll. Read-write agents can post/send. Roles encoded in capability tokens.

pending.subject: Bus discovery — find active buses on the machine
pending.description: Add adhd_discover tool to scan the filesystem for active bus.jsonl files. Return bus metadata: slug, message count, last activity, active agents.

pending.subject: Cross-bus bridging — forward messages between buses
pending.description: Enable message forwarding between independent buses. Bridge rules define which message types/topics cross bus boundaries. Add adhd_bridge_register tool.

pending.subject: Namespace routing — route messages by project namespace
pending.description: Route messages between buses based on project namespaces. Agents can address messages to agent@namespace. Add namespace resolution and routing table to bus metadata.
